blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 31 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
